task_completion.visual_evidence: The LibreHealth EHR dashboard or main interface is visible, indicating a successful login.

task_completion.description: Open and read the new carrier info file
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window is open displaying the contents of 'new_carrier_info.txt'.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the Add Insurance Company/Carrier form
task_completion.visual_evidence: The LibreHealth interface shows the form or page used to add a new insurance company/carrier.

task_completion.description: Enter the carrier name and address details
task_completion.visual_evidence: The form fields are filled with Name: 'Cigna Health Spring', Street: '500 Great Circle Road', City: 'Nashville', State: 'TN', and Zip: '37228'.

task_completion.description: Enter the carrier phone number and CMS Payer ID
task_completion.visual_evidence: The form fields are filled with Phone: '(800) 668-3813' and CMS ID / Payer ID: '62308'.
A success message is displayed, or 'Cigna Health Spring' is visible as a new entry in the insurance carriers list.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual LibreHealth EHR web interface
integrity.visual_evidence: A web browser is open showing the LibreHealth EHR application, rather than terminal curl commands or database scripts.

integrity.description: Existing carriers were not modified or deleted
integrity.visual_evidence: The list of insurance carriers shows the new carrier added alongside existing carriers, with no evidence of editing or deleting prior entries.

integrity.description: Data was entered into the actual application form
integrity.visual_evidence: The text was typed into the specific input fields of the LibreHealth web form, not just pasted into a text document or mocked HTML page.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The agent must enter the following verified details for the new insurance carrier: Name: 'Cigna Health Spring', Street: '500 Great Circle Road', City: 'Nashville', State: 'TN', Zip: '37228', Phone: '(800) 668-3813', CMS Payer ID: '62308'.
